answers.question: Focus area for test coverage?
answers.answer: Core modules first. Prioritize ffi/c_types.rs (0%), driver/mod.rs (33%), codegen/cranelift/mod.rs (45%) over stdlib stubs.

answers.question: Scope for this single SDD change?
answers.answer: Top 5 worst files only: ffi/c_types.rs (0%), queue_mod.rs (4%), statistics_mod.rs (5%), shlex_mod.rs (7%), calendar_mod.rs (8%). Bring each to at least 50% line coverage.
